summary: CRM Dolibarr Integration - All backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly. Complete CRUD operations for CRM connections, test-connection, and sync functionality tested.
backend_tests_passed: GET /api/crm/connections - returns list of connections (auth required)
POST /api/crm/connections - creates new Dolibarr connection with sync_settings
POST /api/crm/test-connection - tests Dolibarr connection without saving
PUT /api/crm/connections/{id} - updates connection config and sync settings
Auth required for all CRM endpoints (returns 401/403 without token)
frontend_tests_passed: CRM page accessible from sidebar under Conexiones menu
Add CRM button opens platform selection dialog
Dolibarr platform shows features: Sincronizar productos, Stock y precios, Proveedores, Pedidos de tiendas
Configuration dialog shows: Name field, API URL field, API Key field
7 sync options displayed: Productos, Stock, Precios, Descripciones, Imágenes, Proveedores, Pedidos
Test Connection button works and shows appropriate error/success toast
Save button creates connection and shows success toast
Connection card displays: name, status badge (Conectado/Desconectado), stats grid
Quick sync section expands with Productos, Proveedores, Importar Pedidos buttons
Sync Completo button opens sync dialog with all sync options
Delete button with confirmation deletes connection
critical_code_review_comments: DolibarrClient class (lines 23-510) is well-implemented with full CRUD for products, suppliers, orders
Image upload to Dolibarr via base64 encoding is properly implemented
Stock update uses movement API with fallback to direct update
All endpoints properly exclude MongoDB _id from responses
Proper error handling with meaningful messages in Spanish
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - tests create and cleanup TEST_ prefixed connections
context_for_next_testing_agent: CRM Dolibarr integration is complete and working. Backend has full implementation for: DolibarrClient (products, suppliers, orders CRUD, image upload, stock sync), CRM connection CRUD endpoints, sync functionality. Frontend CRM.jsx page properly integrates with backend APIs. Navigation under Conexiones submenu works correctly.

features_verified.crm_connections_list: GET /api/crm/connections returns list with stats for connected CRMs
features_verified.create_connection: POST /api/crm/connections creates Dolibarr connection with sync settings
features_verified.test_connection: POST /api/crm/test-connection tests API connectivity without saving
features_verified.update_connection: PUT /api/crm/connections/{id} updates config and sync settings
features_verified.sync_all: POST /api/crm/connections/{id}/sync with sync_type=all syncs products, suppliers, orders
features_verified.ui_navigation: CRM page accessible via sidebar Conexiones > CRM
features_verified.ui_form: Add/Edit dialog with api_url and api_key fields for Dolibarr
features_verified.ui_sync_options: 7 checkboxes: productos, stock, precios, descripciones, imágenes, proveedores, pedidos
